code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut count = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      in_token = false
    else
      if not in_token
        count = count + 1
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let idx = count % 3
mut name = "Red"
match idx
when 0
  name = "Red"
when 1
  name = "Green"
when 2
  name = "Yellow"
when _
  name = "Red"
end
println(name)
